votes.rationale: All 5 Phase 1 executor panels scaffold cleanly under the reconciled structure. Each panel emits exactly 2 candidate files and the Phase 1 slot overlay resolves 10 live slots correctly. No code changes were needed. The foundation substrate is proven consistent at the scaffold layer.

Scaffold parity is confirmed across the full executor surface. The proof is honest about its boundaries: it validates scaffold behavior only, not scoring, selection, or winner determination. Those remain explicitly unproven and are appropriate targets for future behavior-proof motions.

The Phase 1 executor substrate is now formally validated at the scaffold layer across all 5 panels. The motion sequence from 0046 through 0049 — canon, consumer wiring, structure reconciliation, foundation proof — is internally consistent and ratifiable.
